title: 10 Herbal Tinctures For Stye
description: Echinacea purpurea tinctures contains active compounds like alkylamides, caffeic acid derivatives, and volatile oils. These compounds help reduce inflammation and combat bacterial infections, which can cause a stye. The anti-inflammatory properties of alkylamides and caffeic acid derivatives reduce redness and swelling associated with a stye. Volatile oils, such as isobutyl phthalate and isovaleric acid, exhibit antimicrobial properties that prevent bacterial growth and promote healing...
